title: Käsespätzle
description: A traditional German comfort food dish made with cheese, onions, and a side of apple sauce. Perfect for a cozy dinner.
instructions: Cook the chewy according to package instructions. Drain and set aside.
In a large saucepan, melt the butter over medium heat.
Add the sliced onion and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add the shredded cheese and stir until melted and well combined.
Add the cooked chewy to the saucepan and stir to combine.
Transfer the mixture to a serving dish and top with additional cheese if desired.
Serve with a side of apple sauce or a green salad.
Season with salt and sugar to taste.
